Events

Join us for community gatherings and HOA meetings.

  • Q3 HOA Board Meeting

    September 10, 2026 | 7:00 PM | Zoom (Link will be emailed)

    The quarterly board meeting is open to all residents. We will be discussing the upcoming landscaping contract renewal and reviewing the year-to-date budget.

  • Annual Neighborhood Summer Picnic

    August 15, 2026 | 12:00 PM - 3:00 PM | Cul-de-sac on Appaloosa Court

    Join us for the annual Meadows of Wright Farm summer picnic! The HOA will provide burgers, hot dogs, and drinks. Please bring a side dish or dessert to share. This is a great opportunity to meet new neighbors and catch up with old friends.

Meadows of Wright Farm HOA

Springfield Township, OH 45231
